principles: Collect and persist only the minimum data required for the declared run purpose.
A product contract imposes no minimum retention beyond zero seconds; the operator must declare any longer purpose-bound period.
Non-public persisted artifacts require verified encryption at rest and in transit with external evidence references.
Deletion is incomplete until a separate verification artifact records the result.
Raw prompts, private provider payloads, and resolved local paths do not enter shipped JSON outputs.

classifications.access_rule: Read access may follow the repository or release audience.
classifications.deletion_rule: Delete when the declared purpose ends unless the operator records a continuing purpose.

classifications.access_rule: Limit access to roles declared in the run lifecycle contract.
classifications.deletion_rule: Schedule deletion at run creation and retain the deletion verification artifact.

classifications.access_rule: Use least-privilege named roles and an external access record.
classifications.deletion_rule: Keep outside the checkout, delete at the declared deadline, and verify independently.

classifications.access_rule: Do not persist in product artifacts; use an approved ephemeral secret or evidence channel.
classifications.deletion_rule: Remove immediately after the operation and verify that no product artifact contains the value.

incident_handling.private_channel: Private GitHub Security Advisory for this repository
incident_handling.release_effect: An open privacy incident or missing containment evidence blocks release.
